title: PUEBLO UNIDO PDX - 211info
text: PUEBLO UNIDO PDX PUEBLO UNIDO PDX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a navigation team that helps community members overcome financial, technological, linguistic, and literacy barriers to legal representation and social services. Eligibility: Individuals with vulnerable immigration status Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm, closed federal holidays Email (503) 912-8925 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 912-8925 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete the Legal and Social Services Request Form. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Indigenous languages from Mexico, Central America, and South America AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: General Legal Aid * Immigration Issues Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services * Hispanic/Latino Community Language Interpretation * Immigration Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
